data.name: PageTitle
data.value: LEVEA Rekonstrukt | Apartment, House and Facade Renovations

data.name: HeroTitle
data.value: Renovation of apartments, houses, holiday properties and facades without unnecessary complications

data.name: HeroText
data.value: We carry out construction and renovation work ranging from smaller upgrades to larger-scale projects. We focus on clear communication, quality workmanship and a dependable process from start to finish.

data.name: HeroBenefit3
data.value: Focus on quality, deadlines and cleanliness

data.name: AboutTitle
data.value: We build on experience, fair dealing and solid results

data.name: AboutText1
data.value: LEVEA Rekonstrukt focuses on interior and exterior renovations. We help clients transform older spaces into modern, practical and long-lasting solutions.

data.name: AboutText2
data.value: Every project is handled with respect to the actual condition of the property, the budget and the client’s expectations. We do not rely on empty promises, but on honest work and straightforward communication.

data.name: AboutBullet1
data.value: Renovation of apartments, family houses and holiday properties

data.name: AboutBullet2
data.value: Repairs and renovation of facades and exterior parts of buildings

data.name: AboutBullet3
data.value: Reliable process from first request to final handover

data.name: AboutImageAlt
data.value: Example of a construction project by LEVEA Rekonstrukt

data.name: ServicesTitle
data.value: What we can do for you

data.name: Service1Text
data.value: Complete and partial apartment renovations, including layout changes, surfaces and construction details.

data.name: Service2Text
data.value: Upgrading older houses, modernising interiors and carrying out structural improvements focused on comfort, function and durability.

data.name: Service3Text
data.value: Renovation of holiday apartments and similar properties for personal use or rental, with emphasis on practicality and clean design.

data.name: Service4Text
data.value: Facade repairs, surface renovation and related exterior work that improves both appearance and weather resistance.

data.name: Service5Text
data.value: Plastering, surface levelling, smaller structural interventions and other finishing work needed for a clean final result.

data.name: Service6Text
data.value: Every property is different. We propose a suitable work process based on the real condition of the building and your requirements.

data.name: ProjectsIntro
data.value: Every project has a different scope, technical condition and client expectation. Below you can see examples of our work with a focus on detail, practicality and the final outcome.

data.name: ProcessStep1Text
data.value: Contact us by phone or email and briefly describe what you need and the expected scope of work.

data.name: ProcessStep2Text
data.value: We assess the condition of the property, discuss the options and propose a suitable scope of work.

data.name: ProcessStep3Text
data.value: Once the schedule is agreed, we begin the work. During the project we focus on workmanship, communication and keeping the site orderly.

data.name: ProcessStep4Text
data.value: After completion, we review the result together and hand over the finished work ready for use.

data.name: ContactTitle
data.value: Looking for renovation or construction work?

data.name: ContactText
data.value: Get in touch with us. We will be glad to discuss the scope of work, possible solutions and the next steps. The first contact is non-binding.

data.name: ContactMapPlaceholder
data.value: Map or service area can be placed here
